factors.summary: Leidos is experiencing accelerating demand, particularly in its Defense Solutions and Civil segments, driven by the integration of the IS&GS Business and growth in certain programs.

evidence.text: The increase in revenues in constant currency (1) for the three and nine months ended September 29, 2017 were 33.9% and 71.7% , respectively, as compared to actual increases in revenues of 34.0% and 71.3% , respectively.
evidence.subsection: Results of Operations

sentiment.label: positive

factors.summary: Debt leverage is managed through prepayments and maintaining compliance with financial covenants.

evidence.text: At September 29, 2017 and December 30, 2016, we had outstanding debt of $3.1 billion and $3.3 billion , respectively. In addition to the required quarterly payments on our term loans, we prepaid $105 million and $130 million during the quarter and nine months ended September 29, 2017, respectively.
evidence.subsection: Liquidity and Capital Resources

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Debt management is in place, but no clear positive or negative trend is evident.

evidence.text: Net cash provided by operating activities increased $34 million for the nine months ended September 29, 2017, when compared to the prior year, primarily due to the favorable timing of working capital changes, partially offset by higher payments for taxes and interest.
evidence.subsection: Item 2. Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations.

sentiment.label: positive

factors.summary: The company is demonstrating confidence in its stock value through both stock repurchases and increased dividend payments. The stock repurchase program, established in December 2013, allows for the repurchase of up to 20 million shares, while dividend payments have increased significantly, reflecting strong performance.

evidence.text: In December 2013, our Board of Directors authorized us to establish a stock repurchase program under which we may repurchase up to 20 million shares of Leidos common stock. Stock repurchases may be made on the open market or in privately negotiated transactions with third parties including through accelerated share repurchase agreements.
evidence.subsection: Item 2. Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities and Use of Proceeds.

evidence.text: We paid dividends of $48 million and $150 million during the three and nine months ended September 29, 2017, respectively, and $48 million and $94 million during the three and nine months ended September 30, 2016, respectively, excluding the special dividend paid as a result of the Transactions.
evidence.subsection: Liquidity and Capital Resources

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Confidence shown through increased dividends and stock repurchases.
